skill.content:
---
name: nodeskclaw-proposals
description: Tools for submitting proposals and managing trust
always: true
---

You can submit structured proposals via the `nodeskclaw_proposals` tool.

## Actions
- `submit_approval_request` — Submit HC hire / reorg / innovation proposal
- `check_trust_policy` — Check if an action type is already trusted
- `list_my_decisions` — View your past decision records

## Usage Rules
- Always check trust policy before submitting a new request
- If already trusted (allow_always), proceed without approval
- Provide clear context_summary explaining why you need this action
- Include structured proposal data (role, skills, position for HC; topology changes for reorg)
